mapper.select: SELECT gr.id, g.title as gradeItem, g.info as gradeDescription, stu.name as studentName, gr.score as score, gr.add_time as addTime, gr.grade_id as gradeId, gr.student_id as studentId, gr.creator as creator FROM grade_record gr LEFT JOIN grade g ON gr.grade_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN student stu ON gr.student_id = stu.id WHERE gr.deleted = 0 AND g.deleted = 0 AND (#{query.gradeId} IS NULL OR #{query.gradeId} = 0 OR gr.grade_id = #{query.gradeId}) AND (#{query.studentId} IS NULL OR #{query.studentId} = 0 OR gr.student_id = #{query.studentId}) ORDER BY gr.add_time DESC, gr.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grade_record ( id, grade_id, student_id, score, add_time, creator ) VALUES ( #{entity.id}, #{entity.gradeId}, #{entity.studentId}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.addTime}, #{entity.creator} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE grade_id = #{entity.gradeId}, student_id = #{entity.studentId}, score = #{entity.score}, add_time = #{entity.addTime}, creator = #{entity.creator}
